description: A 'We are here to help' chat prompt appears in the bottom right corner of the screen.
frame_description: The ANZ home loan comparison page is visible, and a chat invitation modal pops up in the lower right corner.

description: User selects the 'Variable' loan type radio button, which triggers an 'Updating results' loading state.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Variable' option under 'The loan type I need is:', causing a loading spinner to appear as the results filter.
